---
title: "Models & Strategies"
listing:
  contents:
    - "posts/model-strategies/*.ipynb"
    - "posts/model-strategies/*.qmd"
  type: grid
  grid-columns: 3
  sort: "date desc"
  categories: true
  filter-ui: true
  sort-ui: [date, title]
  image-placeholder: "assets/research-placeholder-pencil.png"
page-layout: full
---

Research notes about trading models, forecasting approaches, and strategy backtests.
